pr.title: Link to decomp.dev instead of repo on Wiki TU page
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: PR 2638 updated the Wiki TU page generator so translation-unit links point to decomp.dev with a URL-encoded unit query instead of repository blob paths. The change also refactored file/link construction into a helper and modernized a few Python type annotations.

key_files.role: Modified Wiki TU markdown table generation: imports urllib.parse.quote, creates decomp.dev TU links, and updates type annotations.

what_changed.text: Replaced repository blob links like ../blob/master/src/{file}.c in TU table rows with decomp.dev links using the unit name query parameter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full removed f'[`{file}`](../blob/master/src/{file}.c)' and now uses link from file_link(unit)
raw_diff: row_slim removed repository blob link and now uses link from file_link(unit)

what_changed.text: Added urllib.parse.quote and URL-encodes unit['name'] with safe='' when constructing the decomp.dev unit URL.
Consolidated file path stripping and link formatting into a new file_link(unit) helper returning both the display file path and markdown link.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added def file_link(unit) -> tuple[str, str]

what_changed.text: Modernized Python typing from typing.Dict and Optional to built-in generic types and PEP 604 unions.

smart_moves.text: Factored link generation into one helper so full and slim table rows share the same target URL behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full and row_slim both consume file_link output

smart_moves.text: URL-encoded the full unit name before placing it in the decomp.dev query string, which is safer than interpolating raw path-like names.

naming_conventions.text: For this tool, the helper name file_link describes the combined operation of deriving the display file path and markdown link for a TU unit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full uses file, link = file_link(unit)

follow_up_queries: Wiki TU page decomp.dev links PR 2638

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR title, author, state, timestamps, changed file counts
notes: The code diff strongly supports what changed in tools/wiki_tu.py.
There is no PR body, issue discussion, review comment, or test output in the slice, so author rationale, reviewer intent, and validation results are not inferred.
This PR is tooling/documentation-oriented, not a decompilation source or matching PR; no assembly tactics or decomp source lessons are promoted.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Wiki TU links should target decomp.dev unit pages
accepted_candidate_records.text: In tools/wiki_tu.py, TU markdown links were changed from repository blob paths to decomp.dev URLs using the full unit name as a URL-encoded unit query parameter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full and row_slim now use link from file_link(unit)

source_update_candidates.title: tools/wiki_tu.py emits decomp.dev TU links
source_update_candidates.text: tools/wiki_tu.py generates Wiki TU table rows and, as of PR 2638, builds markdown links to https://decomp.dev/doldecomp/melee?unit=<url-encoded unit name> rather than ../blob/master/src/<file>.c repository links.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed repository blob link formatting from row_full and row_slim
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a stable path-specific tooling behavior that may help future agents classify or modify Wiki TU page generation.
